description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, asymmetrical footprint and a complex, multi-faceted hip roof. The exterior features a combination of brick and light-colored siding, with prominent gables and decorative trim on the front facade. Large windows are arranged in both symmetrical and grouped patterns, with bay windows and dormers adding architectural interest. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, while a spacious driveway leads to an attached garage. The property is bordered by paved walkways and green lawn areas, creating a welcoming residential appearance. Multiple chimneys and skylights are visible on the roof, suggesting a well-ventilated and naturally lit interior.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, brick and siding exterior, prominent gables, large windows, and a covered front porch. The property includes a driveway, attached garage, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear of the bungalow with a wide brick facade, two doors, and a covered area adjacent to the driveway.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance with a covered porch, decorative gables, symmetrical windows, and potted plants.
description_view_2: This side view reveals a curved bay window, additional covered porch area, and a mix of brick and siding along the exterior.
description_view_3: The garage side is visible here, with a large driveway, garage doors, and a blend of brickwork and siding, as well as a prominent bay window.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with bay and grouped side windows
